attacking_style: Launches solo attacks on final cobbled climbs 15km from finish, exploiting positioned fatigue after teammates exhaust chasers. Prefers tactical patience over raw power, timing moves when opposition is disorganized.
team_tactics: Quick-Step deploys him in breakaways while controlling behind, using teammates to absorb chasing duties before his attack. Team exhausts opposition through tempo before his decisive move.
terrain_preference: Excels on cobbled climbs in closing 15km of classics. Vulnerable in sprint finishes when forced to do organizational work. Crashes suggest positioning issues in peloton transitions post-climb.
vulnerability: Sprint freshness compromised when doing excessive organizational work. Prone to crashes in peloton middle during pace drops after climbs. Late tactical decisions when isolated from team support.
key_patterns: Attacks on final cobbled sectors 15km out after teammates fatigue chasers (2 instances)
Loses sprint finish when forced to do organizational chase work earlier (3 instances)
Crashes in peloton middle during post-climb pace transitions (2 instances)
Quick-Step places him in breakaways while controlling behind with other riders (2 instances)
Tactical patience prioritized over early aggression, waits for disorganization (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: Most recent 2021 observation shows him sacrificed in breakaway role rather than protected leader, suggesting diminished status within Quick-Step hierarchy
